column1: Hey Rafael, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
but i only need some party packages
Cancun is dope for sure. okay, you already have your hotel booked?
we dont really do just flights. youre better of getting that on your own, you'll save a lot of money
party pass we can do, which resort are you staying at?
we are staying on an airbnb actually
but i saw there's a few artist in the nightclubs that week
i was wondering if there's like a bundle or something for a few clubs
yea we have an open bar party pass that comes with express entry and cover charge at spots like D'Cave, Rakata, Hall of Fame, Mandala Beach, Coco Bongo, and a few more
only thing is, if youre not on one of the resorts we service, we may not be able to service you with the party pass. because our staff to redeem the pass will be on resort only
I'll have to check in and see what the options are since you'll be staying at an airbnb
i'm really interested in the service
we just saw it after booking everything
Yea I'd love to help man. will let you know as soon as I do
would you be interested in staying on resort with a bunch of other college students instead? dont know if its too late to cancel the airbnb
whats your email brother, ill send you the details for the party pass anyway while I find out if we can still get you situated
it depends how much is the resort
hey you ever get that email?
i'm not sure i've received a response
but i wanted to tell you that i think is amazing
is there any chance we can have a call?
Oh awesome. I mustve missed it apologies
what times work for you for a call?
i'm free right now if you are free
yea I'll give you a call in 5
it will be from our main line a 888 #
Hey Rafael! we're able to have a team member meet you on the 9th at the Krystal to get your tickets!
Happy that I get to help you with this
Did we want to do 4 nights party pass?
i'll talk right now with my friends to ask them if 3 or 4 nights and also when is like a deadline for us to pay you?
or how can we do the payment
I will make the portal link for you each to go in and make your payments. Just let me know if 4 night or 3 night!
There will be a link you can share with all of your friends
hey did we want to do 4 nights or 3 nights? will send right now
okay, I will set it up for you right now
there will be a few that will buy later is that okay?
Hello! Spiffy i wanted to ask you something
so if i make the first payment i secure our reservation?
is there a date where we all have pay before the spring break dates? we wouldn't want the price to increase

Hi Rafael! The payment secures your own party pass, not for the rest of the group though. everyone has to make their own payment in order to secure their pass. I recommend making the payment as soon as possible, the reservation will become expired if it stays inactive for a few days
hello i'm still not understanding, can you help me please!
Morning, would you like to schedule a call later today?
that is what i wanted to ask you
some of my friends can't pay now
i asked you if we could pay later
Okay, what times work for you today?
hey can i call you in 30 minutes?
hey Rafael checking in. did you have any more questions about the party pass
spiffy i'm going to do the payment on monday please
i am here i will pay today
Okay, just let me know if you need any help
spiffy i just got paid so im paying now in the afternoon sorry for the delay
is the open bar inside the clubs?
Inside the clubs. You're not staying at the hotel, just going there to meet our staff to pickup your wristbands / tickets
one of my friends just paid as well
the other ones will also pay on these days
Is there any confirmation or anything else?
Hi Rafael, yes there should be a confirmation receipt in your email as well. I can also confirm on my end that I see your account on our party pass list and your payment
Hello spiffy i wanted to ask you, it includes coco bongo right?
Coco Bongo actually just got separated as its own ticket last week since the price went up. If you wanted Coco specifically as one of your nights just let me know and I'll put the adjustment in
yes please spiffy, we will definitely want coco bongo for one of our nights
it depends, how much would it add to the cost?
its a $10 difference. is that okay?
I'll hook yours up for you, and your friend, since you've already paid
Anyone else though, if they want coco bongo as one of the nights, it'll be $289

Hello Spiffy! How are you? is there anything else you need for the confirmation of the nightclubs? Also i wanted to ask you, what is the time of open bar all nights? Is it like giving bottles or mixed drinks? Please i wanted to know a little more detail about that please! Thank you so much!!
You guys will be getting an email in the next few days with all that info! For the clubs the open bar is usually 9-2, in that time frame
and its open for mixed drinks, they do offer bottle service at some spots but thats not included
also, my friends wanted to pay but is still in $279, are you going to change that? so you can add us Coco Bongo?
hey yes Coco bongo has been added in, and the total is now $289. you and your friend Bruno are $279
youll see 1 night coco bongo + 3 nights. so its still the 4 nights total. you can choose the other 3 nights when you meet our staff at the Krystal
hey checkin in, got a bunch of open spots still on your res. Did you have other people still planning to join?
Hello spiffy! can i call you tomorrow?
perfect! is it okay in the morning?
we are little bit worried about the new cartel stuff going on in mexico
how are you? is it okay if i call you?
i have a few questions regarding the plan trip an everything please!!
Hi Rafael I am around for a call today! what questions do you have
Hi Rafael, I am free now if you are
yes! it doesn't let me call you

i have a problem with one of my guys, he won't be able to go to cancun anymore, due to the problems that there has been happening in Mexico. He won't travel anymore and i wanted to ask you if there is any chance you guys can give him a refund from the trip. Is to Bruno Arenal
Hi so he wants a refund on his party pass?
We tried to convince him but he has decided with his parents as well
yes please, i am sorry for the inconvenience
hey Rafael, I put in the inquiry to see if we can refund the party pass for Bruno. typically its non-refundable
I cant guarantee but we will see
okay thank you so much spiffy
also i have a question, can we choose to go coco bongo on friday?
Coco Bongo can be used on Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday
or we should change coco bongo on monday for example and then finish with another nightclub on Friday
please if you can help me with this so i plan the week
if we want to use the 4 nights as the city on monday, mandala beach on Tuesday, dcave on wednesday, thursday nothing and then finish the last nightclub with coco bongo on friday is possible?
did you check out the email I sent over with the scheduled dates?
Tuesday go to Mandala Beach Night Wednesday go to D'Cave And then Monday and Thursday you can decide between Mandala and Coco Bongo
Actually you'll have to do Coco Bongo Monday
so Monday Coco Bongo Tuesday Mandala Beach Night Wednesday D'Cave Thursday Mandala Nightclub
instead of going out on thursday can we go out on friday night?
so Monday Coco Bongo Tuesday Mandala Beach Night Wednesday D'Cave Friday Mandala Nightclub
Friday March 15 is a venue called Rakata as the feature night
When you check in with our staff at the Krystal, they will know what the possibilities are
Okay i will, but to see if it's possible, can we go out on friday to rakata instead of going out on Thursday?
for that friday we should also have a reservation right? instead of thursday
Yes you can. I just thought you were leaving the 13th
Oh no, jaja we leave the 14th but we wanted to leave the thursday to chill and then go out on friday
can you update the schedule that you sent us to gmail with this?
what do you think about the city on friday, would that be okay? rather than rakata?
we would really want to go to coco bongo on friday tho, there is no way we can do that?
When you check in with the on site staff at the Krystal on the 9th, they will be able to tell you all of the possibilities
and also, i wanted to ask you about the refund for my friend bruno
Unfortunately the pass is non refundable and I am still waiting to see if there is an exception. Trying but theres no guarantee
I will let you know as soon as I know
I wanted to ask you if we are missing something, or if we need something else before traveling
Hey you should be all set just screenshot all of your vouchers and have them ready for when you go to the Krystal
we are about to be in krystal!
Hey! Can you wait a few mins? I'm gonna make sure they are there and ready for you
we are here, they told me they are in lunch or something
Okay, yea I haven't hear back just yet
I'm waiting to hear back from them, they must have their phones down while having lunch
please, or until what time they are here?
we are all of the group people right now
As soon as I hear back I'll let you know. I was asking you to wait initially so that I could make sure they were ready before you got there
yes, we were already there so that was an issue
would you say in an hour?
Gotcha. Maybe wait a few more minutes hopefully they respond and let me know
Hey Rafael they will be there at 7pm tonight
with everything? so we all get there
Yes just have all to have your vouchers ready
yea we were there, perfect thank you spiffy
we will be there at 7 then
Here is Alex's contact as well, just so you have it ‪+52 998 734 7954‬
Alex will be at the Krystal waiting for you
are we getting with other people??
Hey Rafael, are you at the party pass table?
Alessa should be in lobby looking for you
alex told me he is near but is he the only one?
Alex and Aleesa are the two. Aleesa I got a response from said she is headed over. Alex should be nearby as well
im still waiting for alex or alessa and i don't see anybody
